name: DeepSeek V4 Pro (1.6T)
description: 1.6T total (49B activated). V4 uses DSA attention: num_kv_heads=1 with a SHARED K==V tensor of head_dim (config.head_dim=512). Represented as MLA with mlaDc=head_dim, mlaDr=0. All 61 layers are MoE (no first_k_dense_replace). Source: HF transformers deepseek_v4/modeling_deepseek_v4.py + official V4 README.
